hero.title: Pado: Unified Onchain Finance
hero.subtitle: Performance without custody. Control without compromise.

oneAccount.title: One Account for Everything
oneAccount.intro: Pado is a self-custodial smart account that unifies trading, prediction markets, lending, and payments on Nasun—a Move-based L1 blockchain built for DeFi.
oneAccount.problem: Your capital is fragmented across protocols. Stablecoins sit idle. Trading opportunities disappear before you can act.
oneAccount.solution: One balance that earns yield, backs positions, stays liquid—and lets you follow proven traders.

features.title: Unified Capital
features.description: Your entire portfolio acts as cross-collateral. Earn yield on stablecoins while they secure your positions.

features.title: Social Trading
features.description: Copy traders with protocol-enforced risk limits. Position-gated groups ensure participants have skin in the game. Prove your track record with zero-knowledge proofs.

features.title: Intent-Based Automation
features.description: Set rules, not transactions. Example: “Keep my ETH collateral above 1.6x health ratio while maximizing stablecoin yield.” Solvers compete to execute—or your intent reverts.

modes.title: Safe Mode
modes.label: Default
modes.description: Isolated positions. No leverage. Your collateral backs one thing at a time.

modes.title: Pro Mode
modes.description: Portfolio-level margin. Yield-bearing collateral. One balance across all products.

modes.title: Institutional
modes.description: Custom APIs, position limits, and compliance controls.

liveNow.title: What’s Live Now
liveNow.closing: Built on Nasun: parallel execution, atomic transactions, sub-second finality.

earlyAccess.title: Early Access
earlyAccess.intro: Limited spots available for private testing.
earlyAccess.prioritizing: Active traders, DeFi builders, and Nasun developers.

footer.badge: Built on Nasun L1 • Move-based • Self-custodial • Apache 2.0
